improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition in under 160 characters. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B trust. These tags are missing or generic on most new sites, so adding them is a quick win for visibility and conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Partner"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — the intelligent assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Get instant answers, voice chat, and expert support. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI partner) and who it serves (trade and business professionals), establishing relevance. The subheading reinforces the target audience, highlights three key features (instant answers, voice chat, expert support), and ends with a clear, low-friction CTA that promotes the free trial without pressure. The word 'partner' conveys reliability and ongoing value, aligning with the professional, trustworthy tone.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. It transparently explains the paywall, reinforces the low entry price, highlights the annual savings, and reminds prospects of the full value they'll receive, reducing hesitation and increasing conversion.
